DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS]
( 
	[JobStatusID] [nvarchar](50)  NOT NULL,
	[JobStatusCategoryID] [nvarchar](50)  NOT NULL,
	[JobStatus] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[isBackLog] [bit]  NULL,
	[isRestricted] [bit]  NULL,
	[Active] [bit]  NULL,
	[LP_JobStatusID] [nvarchar](2)  NULL,
	[LP_JobStatusCategoryID] [nvarchar](2)  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](10)  NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [DATETIME]  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
GO
